name: Artificial Intelligence
description: From foundation-model evaluation to applied ML systems — research, standards, and practitioner exchange.

name: Security & Privacy
description: Applied cryptography, threat research, and privacy-engineering practice across industry and academia.

name: Systems & Infrastructure
description: Distributed systems, cloud platforms, and the operational discipline that keeps them reliable at scale.

name: Human-Computer Interaction
description: Design research, accessibility, and the craft of building technology people can actually trust and use.

name: Sustainability
description: Carbon-aware computing, circular hardware, and the energy economics of modern infrastructure.

name: Robotics & Autonomy
description: Perception, control, and safety validation for robots and autonomous systems operating in the physical world.

name: Data & Governance
description: Data ethics, algorithmic accountability, and the governance frameworks shaping how technology is regulated.

name: Student & Early Career
description: Mentorship, hackathons, and career-launch programming for students and early-career professionals.
